entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 60S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, INCREASING TO 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH, BECOMING WEST 5 TO 10 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 80
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
